headline: Webull Ships Vega AI Decision Partner to 24M+ Users With Voice Trading and Real-Time Portfolio Analysis — Free
the_so_what: Webull giving 24 million users free AI-powered options analysis and voice trading follows the same margin-destruction pattern that free commission trading created in 2019. Robinhood launched Cortex for Gold subscribers at a premium; Webull is giving comparable AI features away. For traditional brokers still selling AI-assisted trading as a premium upsell, the pricing floor just dropped to zero.
summary: Webull launched Vega, an AI-powered decision partner available at no cost to its 24 million+ registered users across 14 markets. The product includes five capabilities: Options Statistics Insights (outlier detection in options chains), Data Summary (unified market context), Portfolio Review (evaluation against investor behaviour), Plain-Language Orders (voice command trading with live interpretation), and Vega Insights (real-time personalised alerts). Group President Anthony Denier framed Vega as consolidating news, earnings, and technical data for traders seeking clarity.

key_stat.label: registered users globally with free access to Vega AI decision partner

verified_claims: Webull launched Vega as 'the next evolution of its AI-powered decision partner' — PRNewswire, Nov 10, 2025
Plain-Language Orders: 'enables clients to place trades easily through natural voice commands, displaying live interpreted details before confirmation' — PRNewswire
Options Statistics Insights: identifies outliers in options chains and translates them into opportunities — PRNewswire
Portfolio Review: evaluates portfolios against investor behaviour to highlight misalignments — PRNewswire
Vega Insights: real-time personalised analysis and alerts based on watchlists and portfolios — PRNewswire
Data Summary: contextual market analysis in a unified platform — PRNewswire
Available at no cost to US Webull customers — PRNewswire
fabricated_claims: Original entry claimed 'complex multi-leg options strategies via voice command' — not present in source; removed in 2026-03-24 revision
Original entry claimed 'real-time portfolio risk analysis' — source describes Portfolio Review (behaviour misalignment), not risk analysis; corrected
_governance.notes: Source fetched and verified 2026-03-24. All claims updated to match PRNewswire press release verbatim. Original pipeline entry had unverified feature claims from truncated source; corrected via direct fetch.
